CVE-2017-7467.title: A buffer overflow flaw was found in the way minicom before versio ...
CVE-2017-7467.description: A buffer overflow flaw was found in the way minicom before version 2.7.1 handled VT100 escape sequences. A malicious terminal device could potentially use this flaw to crash minicom, or execute arbitrary code in the context of the minicom process.
